title: [FIRRTL] Fix unpacked array ordering in GCT and ExportVerilog

features.name: unpacked array dimension ordering in multi-dimensional arrays
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array declaration where the outer dimension size differs from inner dimension size

features.name: mixed packed and unpacked array dimensions with multiple unpacked levels
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array with multiple levels of unpacked dimensions and packed dimensions following the correct outer-to-inner ordering
